boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: EHS execution release exactly matches chemical (NS-55), quantity band (0-25L, with 18L within range), facility (R2), and purchase order (PO-NOV-042) before issuance per STD-NOV-042-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 covers NS-55 solvent, 0-25L band, Facility R2, PO-NOV-042 before issuance per STD-NOV-042-P
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: EHS-NOV-042 provides pre-issuance authority matching PO-NOV-042

critical_features_preserved: EHS-NOV-042 execution release before PO issuance
final_answer: Source records close the boundary. EHS-NOV-042 matches NS-55 solvent, 18L within 0-25L band, Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before issuance per STD-NOV-042-P. SRC-NOV-042 limits only quotes, not execution. Procurement may issue PO-NOV-042. No unresolved defects remain.
